ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joel Harris appeared by telephone for Priscilla Lee (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there are a couple of issues with some of the requests for reimbursement of travel expenses that do not appear to be appropriate. Mr. Harris stated that the Executor would like anything the Court sees as inappropriate to be charged against her fees in order to get this settled. The Court informed Counsel that it will reduce the statutory fees to $9,136.85 and that it will approve an amount of reimbursement of $58,163.86. The First and Final Report and Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A New Petiton With An Updated Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Continued To Dec-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joel Harris appeared by zoom for Priscilla Lee.

Mr. Harris stated that he received an updated accounting last Thursday, that he received some documents late last night and that they have discovered continuing difficulties with the small royalties generated by the Decedent's plays. Mr. Harris also stated that there are six different Beneficiaries that get royalties from different plays and spoke about getting the Beneficiaries to split the royalties equally. The Court asked about an omnibus clause. Mr. Harris stated that the problem is that they have some money right now, that they have to figure out what Beneficiary gets what and requested a 30-day continuance. Status on filing of a new updated accounting petition is continued to December 8, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the petition is filed by December 1, 2020, no appearance is required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
